title: Momo Dumpling Bar
description: A late-night dumpling spot in the CBD. One TikTok of their chilli oil dumplings hit 2.4M views — and they've been packed every night since.
results: Sold out every Friday & Saturday for 10 weeks
body:
## The Brief

Momo is a 30-seat dumpling bar on a CBD laneway. Great food, zero online presence. The owner knew social media was important but had no idea where to start.

## Our Approach

We focused entirely on TikTok. The food was inherently visual — handmade dumplings, chilli oil drizzles, steam rising from bamboo baskets. We filmed a series of close-up food videos with trending audio, posting 4-5 times per week.

The breakthrough came from a 15-second clip of their signature chilli oil dumplings being pulled apart in slow motion. We boosted it with $50 in TikTok Spark Ads.

## The Results

That single TikTok hit 2.4M views. Momo was sold out every Friday and Saturday for the next 10 weeks. They gained 1,800 followers in one week and now have a loyal following that drives consistent midweek traffic too.
